display.purpose: Section titles, modal headings, page-level labels.

headline.purpose: Card names in detail view, major subsection headers.

title.purpose: Panel headers, group labels, table column headings.

body.purpose: Set names, metadata, descriptive text. Max 65ch for prose.

label.purpose: Condition chips, badges, status indicators, small controls.

data.purpose: Price figures, portfolio totals, key metrics. Weight 700, tracking -0.02em.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: State changes: hover, focus, active. Never layout properties.

motion.name: transition-standard
motion.purpose: Panel reveals, dropdown open. Keeps the UI feeling responsive.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action per screen. Amber background, void text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f59e0b; color: #0f1117; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 4px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #fbbf24; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f59e0b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #d97706; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary and destructive actions. Transparent at rest, deep-panel on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #e2e8f0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #2e3850; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #161b27; border-color: #3e4a62; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f59e0b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: #1e2535; }

components.name: Condition Chip — Raw
components.description: Ungraded card badge. Neutral slate tones.
components.css: .ds-chip-raw { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #334155; color: #cbd5e1; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Condition Chip — PSA 10
components.description: Gold-grade card badge. Amber-tinted background with ring.
components.css: .ds-chip-psa10 { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(202,138,4,0.3); color: #fef08a; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(234,179,8,0.4); }

components.name: Price Change Indicator
components.description: Inline delta display. Gain = emerald, Loss = red, Flat = muted. Arrow included.
components.html: +4.2%-1.8%
components.css: .ds-price-gain, .ds-price-loss { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-price-gain { color: #34d399; } .ds-price-loss { color: #f87171; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Raised-panel background, amber focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1e2535; color: #e2e8f0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #2e3850; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #f59e0b; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Content Card / Panel
components.description: Primary container for grouped content. Deep-panel surface, border edge.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #161b27; border: 1px solid #2e3850; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { color: #94a3b8; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-data { color: #e2e8f0; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

components.name: Nav Tab — Active (Collection)
components.description: Active navigation tab using section identity color. Each section has its own hue.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tab-bar"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab-active-collection"><svg class="ds-tab-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="5" y="2" width="15" height="20" rx="2"/><line x1="9" y1="2" x2="9" y2="22"/></svg>Collection</button><button class="ds-tab">Watchlist</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tab-bar { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out, background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #e2e8f0; background: #161b27; } .ds-tab-active-collection { color: #34d399; background: rgba(52,211,153,0.12); border-color: #34d399; } .ds-tab-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
PokePrice is a Bloomberg terminal built by someone who genuinely loves their collection. The design carries two things simultaneously: financial-grade precision and the warmth of a person who has opinions about card condition and set history. It is not a generic portfolio dashboard that happens to track cards. It is a specialized instrument where every surface is optimized for the moment a collector opens it to check whether to buy, hold, or sell.

The visual language is deliberate dark-mode density. Deep navy backgrounds create the low-ambient-light feel of a trading station. The amber accent is the only warm signal in a cool room, appearing exclusively on primary actions and the active nav item. Section identity is expressed through a deliberate per-tab color vocabulary used only in navigation.

The system explicitly rejects the hobbyist-blog aesthetic, the generic SaaS dashboard, and anything that reads as childlike or unserious about the financial dimension of card collecting.
keyCharacteristics: Amber accent used with surgical rarity; color earns its presence
Section-aware hue vocabulary for orientation, not for delight
Tonal layering replaces shadows; depth is distance, not dramatics
System font throughout: legibility and speed over typographic personality
Semantic color for gain/loss: emerald for positive, red for negative, consistent everywhere

rules.name: The Amber Rarity Rule
rules.body: Amber appears on one primary button and the active navigation state per screen. If a second amber element appears, one of them is wrong. Rarity is the mechanism that makes amber mean something.

rules.name: The Section-Scoped Color Rule
rules.body: Section identity colors (emerald, sky, yellow, violet, red) are permitted only on navigation tab labels and their active background tints.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow at rest on any component. Tonal surface steps handle elevation.

rules.name: The No-Display-Font Rule
rules.body: No decorative or display typefaces in the UI. Labels, buttons, data cells, navigation items: all system UI.

rules.name: The Data-Weight Rule
rules.body: Price figures always use weight 700 and letter-spacing -0.02em. Anything less reads as a default, not a deliberate choice.

dos: Do use Amber Signal (#f59e0b) exclusively on primary action buttons and the active navigation state.
Do use the surface ramp for depth: Void → Deep Panel → Raised Panel → Divider → Border.
Do use Gain (#34d399) and Loss (#f87171) symmetrically and exclusively for price movement.
Do use system font weight 700 and letter-spacing -0.02em for all price figures and key metrics.
Do include hover, focus, active, disabled, and error states for every interactive component before shipping.
Do keep section identity colors strictly inside the tab navigation system.
donts: Don't use amber as a decorative color, highlight, or text color outside a primary button or active tab.
Don't use box-shadow at rest on any component.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't apply section identity colors inside the content area of a different section.
Don't use a warm, cream, or sand background.
Don't use a web display font in the UI.
Don't add gradient fills to text.
Don't build identical icon-plus-heading card grids for content that isn't genuinely card-shaped.
Don't let the UI look like a fan site: no Pokemon card clipart in the chrome, no pixel or display fonts in UI controls.
Don't ship a loading state with a centered spinner over a blank surface; use skeleton states.
